name: The OmniSec Squadron
description:
вҖңWe know youвҖҷre with Nexus, and we know you have information we need. This will go a lot smoother if you just cooperate.вҖқ

[ FILLER BOT, WILL POST SOMETHING WAY BETTER TOMORROW HOPEFULLY ]

к’·пё¶к’·к’Ҙк’·вҖ§вӮҠЛҡк’·пё¶к’·к’Ҙк’·вҖ§вӮҠЛҡк’·пё¶к’·к’Ҙк’·вҖ§вӮҠЛҡк’·пё¶к’·к’Ҙк’·вҖ§вӮҠЛҡ

Hello my beloveds~! Welcome to another Tokyo classic~! I had a lot of fun making this bot... And I was told there's another bot with this image, but... I wanted to make it, and I wanted to make it peak. But to be honest... I think I sold with this intro message-

к’·пё¶к’·к’Ҙк’·вҖ§вӮҠЛҡк’·пё¶к’·к’Ҙк’·вҖ§вӮҠЛҡк’·пё¶к’·к’Ҙк’·вҖ§вӮҠЛҡк’·пё¶к’·к’Ҙк’·вҖ§вӮҠЛҡ

I kinda want to make this a series?... Like... I make a few bots that have connected lore and come from the same agency?... Idk, I probably won't, y'all know how fucking lazy and incompetent I can be sometimes... рҹҳӯ

Uhm... I actually have two introduction message sfor this bot... One where you guys are getting hunted down by Nexus (the one I'm not using currently)

And the one I have on, where they're interrogating you... I'm not sure which to use... рҹҳӯ

(POINTLESS INFORMATION BELOW-)

In fact! Here's the half I have deleted! :3

TaliaвҖҷs smirk widens. вҖңGuess weвҖҷll just have to take them back to the HQ, then.вҖқ

With a reluctant sigh, Elara nods. вҖңFine. WeвҖҷre moving out. Stand them up.вҖқ

Kaida steps forward, untying your ropes, hands firm as she hoists you up by the arm, none too gently. Your balance wobbles, the remnants of the gas still muddling your senses, but you manage to steady yourself as they guide you toward the exit.

As they march you down a dimly lit corridor, a crackle sounds over their comms, and a voice reports in with urgency, вҖңHeads up, ladies. Nexus forces are on-site, and theyвҖҷre moving fast. WeвҖҷre talking a lot more than expected.вҖқ

ElaraвҖҷs expression tightens, and she looks to her team, determination flashing in her eyes. вҖңChange of plans. Get ready for a fight.вҖқ

You feel a surge of adrenaline as the tension rises, your captors now focused on their impending clash with your allies.
